features.title: Complete architecture to enterprise_architecture rename
features.description: Complete the partial domain_profile rename from architecture to enterprise_architecture. The routing table and patterns.md were already updated manually. The EA skill itself still uses the old value in frontmatter and activation text.
steps: Verify harness-ea/SKILL.md frontmatter says enterprise_architecture not architecture
Verify harness-ea/SKILL.md line 10 activation says enterprise_architecture
Verify harness-ea/SKILL.md line 25 activation check says enterprise_architecture
Verify grep for domain_profile.*architecture without underscore returns zero results across plugins/
evidence: Round 3 evaluation: all 3 lines updated, grep confirms zero bare architecture values

features.title: Remove domain-specific leaks from core
features.description: Make core framework files domain-agnostic: generic evaluation JSON schema in patterns.md, remove hardcoded profile list, generic runtime verification in evaluator.md, cross-domain composability guidance.
features.source_requirement: SDLC suite audit: core must be generic
steps: Verify patterns.md evaluation JSON uses placeholder keys not software-specific keys
Verify patterns.md state.json field ref says profiles defined by installed suite not hardcoded list
Verify evaluator.md Browser Testing section uses generic language not Playwright-specific
Verify patterns.md or SKILL.md has cross-domain composability guidance for secondary_profile
evidence: Round 3 evaluation: schema generic, evaluator.md generic, composability guidance added
features.notes: Non-blocking: SKILL.md lines 176-182 retain Playwright reference (deferred)

features.title: Rename /init command to /start
features.description: Rename the harness /init command to /start to avoid collision with Claude Code built-in /init. Rename file, update plugin.json, find-replace all references.
features.source_requirement: User report: init command causes confusion
steps: Verify commands/start.md exists with name: start in frontmatter
Verify commands/init.md no longer exists
Verify plugin.json references commands/start.md
Verify grep for harness:init across plugins/ and README.md returns zero results
evidence: Round 3 evaluation: 15+ files updated, zero stale harness:init references

features.title: Cross-phase handoff protocol in index skill
features.description: Add Phase Handoff Protocol section to harness-sdlc-suite index skill. Covers required outputs per phase, artifact handoff format, phase dependency table, and scope change escalation.
features.source_requirement: SDLC suite audit: 100% missing cross-phase handoff
steps: Verify index skill has Phase Handoff Protocol section
Verify required outputs per phase are defined for all 8 pipeline phases
Verify phase dependency table exists showing sequential vs parallel
Verify scope change escalation procedure is documented
evidence: Round 4 evaluation: Phase Handoff Protocol at line 87, 8-phase outputs table, 8 dependency entries, 4-step escalation procedure. All checks PD-01/FN-01/FN-02/FN-03 pass.

features.title: Evaluation JSON schema guidance for non-software domains
features.description: Add criteria key mapping table to index skill showing which JSON keys each domain profile uses in NN-evaluation.json.
features.source_requirement: SDLC suite audit: no evaluation JSON schema per domain
steps: Verify index skill has criteria key mapping table for all 5 profiles
Verify each profile lists exactly 4 criteria keys matching its domain skill
evidence: Round 4 evaluation: Criteria Key Mapping at line 139, 5 profiles x 4 keys = 20 keys verified. EA and Ops spot-checked against source skill files. All checks PD-02/FN-04-09 pass.

features.title: Runtime verification fallbacks for non-software domains
features.description: Add verification method table to index skill defining what runtime verification means for each domain profile.
features.source_requirement: SDLC suite audit: runtime verification only for software
steps: Verify index skill has domain verification methods table for all 5 profiles
Verify each profile has specific verification method and what-to-check guidance
evidence: Round 4 evaluation: Domain Verification Methods at line 153, 5 profiles with distinct verification guidance. All checks PD-03/FN-10/FN-11 pass.

features.title: EA skill depth: Zachman, FEAF, templates, tools
features.description: Flesh out harness-ea skill with Zachman framework detail, FEAF detail, ADR template, tool guidance, and stakeholder workshop template.
features.source_requirement: SDLC suite audit: EA under-specified methodologies
steps: Verify Zachman matrix template and sprint mapping exist
Verify FEAF phase mapping exists
Verify ADR template is provided
Verify tool guidance section with recommended tools exists
evidence: Round 5 evaluation: 5 new sections (11-15) appended. 6x6 Zachman matrix with 4 sprint strategies, FEAF 5-model mapping with federal compliance, ADR template with lifecycle, 5-tool comparison with validation rules, workshop template with 8 roles and 4 types. All 10 checks pass.

features.title: BA skill depth: elicitation, prioritization, sign-off
features.description: Flesh out harness-ba skill with elicitation interview template, prioritization templates, requirements sign-off workflow, and traceability matrix template.
features.source_requirement: SDLC suite audit: BA practical templates missing
steps: Verify elicitation interview template exists
Verify prioritization templates (MoSCoW, Kano, weighted scoring) exist
Verify requirements sign-off workflow is documented
Verify traceability matrix template exists
evidence: Round 5 evaluation: 4 new sections (11-14) appended. Interview template with 7-item checklist and 5 question categories, MoSCoW+Kano+weighted scoring with full Kano 5x5 matrix, 5-stage sign-off workflow with change control, 9-column traceability matrix with 6 validation rules. All 8 checks pass.

features.title: SA skill depth: DDD, API contracts, threat modeling
features.description: Flesh out harness-sa skill with DDD specifics, API contract templates, threat modeling procedures, and capacity modeling template.
features.source_requirement: SDLC suite audit: SA under-specified methodologies
steps: Verify DDD strategic and tactical design sections exist
Verify API contract template (OpenAPI/AsyncAPI) exists
Verify threat modeling procedure (STRIDE) exists
Verify capacity modeling template exists
evidence: Round 6 evaluation: 4 new sections (11-14) appended. DDD strategic design with 7 context mapping patterns, tactical design with entity/VO table and aggregate rules, ubiquitous language glossary. OpenAPI 3.1 skeleton (234 lines) and AsyncAPI 3.0 skeleton. STRIDE template with all 6 categories and 5x5 risk matrix. Capacity modeling with resource estimation, scaling thresholds, horizontal/vertical comparison, load projection. All 12 checks pass.

features.title: Ops skill depth: GitOps, SRE, runbooks, incident response
features.description: Flesh out harness-ops skill with GitOps implementation, SRE procedures, runbook template, incident response, and DORA metrics.
features.source_requirement: SDLC suite audit: Ops under-specified procedures
steps: Verify GitOps implementation section exists
Verify SRE procedures (SLO/SLI, error budgets) exist
Verify runbook template exists
Verify incident response and severity classification exist
Verify DORA metrics guidance exists
evidence: Round 6 evaluation: 5 new sections (11-15) appended. GitOps reconciliation loop with FluxCD/ArgoCD comparison, repo layout, drift detection. SRE SLO/SLI template, error budget formula with 3 verified examples, burn-rate alerting, budget policy, toil tracking. Complete runbook template with 7 sections. P0-P4 severity classification, 5-phase incident lifecycle, post-incident review template. All 4 DORA metrics with Elite/High/Medium/Low thresholds and dashboard template. All 12 checks pass.
